symbols.name: IdGenerator
symbols.summary: Inspired by https://github.com/aspnet/KestrelHttpServer/blob/6fde01a825cffc09998d3f8a49464f7fbe40f9c4/src/Kestrel.Core/Internal/Infrastructure/CorrelationIdGenerator.cs , this class generates an efficient 20-bytes ID which is the concatenation of a base36 encoded machine name and base32 encoded System.Int64 using the alphabet 0-9 and A-V.
